name: Garden Relish
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Head of cauliflower (sliced into flowerets 1/4 inch thick)
1 Green pepper (cut the same way as above)
2 green olives from a small jar
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a skillet.
2. Add 1/4 cup of water to the skillet.
3. Bring the mixture to a boil over medium heat.
4. Reduce heat and simmer, covered, for 5 minutes.
5. Allow the mixture to cool completely.
6. Refrigerate for 24 hours.
7. Drain before serving.
